item.title: 🇺🇸 US Senate Advances Resolution to Limit Trump's Iran War Powers
item.description: The US Senate moved forward with a bipartisan resolution requiring congressional approval before extending military action against Iran, a significant check on presidential war-making authority.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇱🇹 Lithuania Issues Air Danger Warning as Drone Violates Airspace
item.description: Lithuania suspended flights at Vilnius airport and moved top officials to safety after a drone violated national airspace, underscoring heightened security concerns on NATO's eastern flank.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Xi and Putin Unite Against US on Nuclear and Security Issues
item.description: Chinese and Russian leaders met in Beijing days after Trump's visit, stressing their "unyielding" ties and criticizing US security policies including the "Golden Dome" missile defense program.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 US Plans to Shrink Forces Available to NATO During Crises
item.description: The Trump administration will tell NATO allies it plans to reduce the pool of US military capabilities available for alliance defense during major crises, three sources familiar with the matter said.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 💰 US Imposes Fresh Sanctions on Iranian Exchange House and Shadow Fleet
item.description: The Trump administration sanctioned an Iranian foreign currency exchange house and front companies overseeing transactions for Iranian banks, maintaining financial pressure on Tehran.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland says US troop deployment delayed, not canceled
item.description: Polands defence minister said no decisions have been made to reduce American troops in the country and recent US moves may only temporarily delay their deployment.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🌏 Foreign selling in Asian equities rises as bond yields climb
item.description: Foreign selling in Asian equities has accelerated in May as investors turn cautious over war-driven inflation and higher borrowing costs on corporate margins across the region.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳 Analysis: China is investable again, for the nimble
item.description: Sentiment towards Chinas $20 trillion economy is no longer at rock bottom. Fund allocations are recovering and foreign investment is rising as Chinas innovation edge helps.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇹🇷⛽ Türkiye proposes NATO military fuel pipeline to strengthen eastern flank
item.description: Türkiye Defense Ministry announced a cost-efficient military fuel pipeline proposal for NATO that would strengthen the alliance's eastern flank. Germany will rotate Patriot systems in Türkiye amid Middle East crisis.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇵🇰🇮🇷 Pakistan interior minister visits Tehran for second time in a week amid Iran-US mediation
item.description: Pakistan's Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi arrived in Tehran for his second visit in less than a week, continuing diplomatic efforts amid Iran-US tensions. Pakistan has positioned itself as a potential mediator.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🥶⚔️ Russia and China express concern over US militarization of Arctic
item.description: Russia and China jointly expressed concern over what they described as growing militarization of the Arctic by the US and its allies, highlighting another area of geopolitical friction between the powers.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇯🇵🧲 Japan feels squeeze as China rare earth magnet exports only partly recover
item.description: China's exports of rare earth magnets to Japan recovered only modestly, with Japanese firms warning of severe supply pressures. Japan remains dependent on Chinese rare earth materials critical for electronics and defense.
item.dc:creator: SCMP

item.title: 📉 UN Cuts Global Growth Forecast Citing Middle East Crisis
item.description: UN economists slashed global GDP forecasts to 2.5% for 2026 and 2.8% for 2027, citing economic fallout from the Iran conflict and regional instability.
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: 🇳🇬 US-Nigeria Joint Strikes Kill 175 ISIL Fighters
item.description: Nigeria announced joint military operations with US forces killed 175 ISIL fighters in the country's northeast, part of an ongoing campaign to hunt down terrorists.
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: ☢️🇷🇺 Russia Launches Unannounced Nuclear Exercise With 65,000 Troops
item.description: Russia began its largest nuclear drills in years without prior notice, mobilizing 65,000 troops, 200 missile launchers, 140 aircraft, and 8 strategic nuclear submarines across a three-day exercise. The timing coincides with Putin's Beijing visit, analysts say it aims to influence NATO decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Defense News

item.title: 🤖🛡️ NATO Eastern Flank Deterrence Strategy Centers on Autonomous Zone
item.description: NATO's new deterrence plan envisions an "autonomous zone" along its eastern border where only unmanned systems operate, with linked sensors and drones to detect invading Russian forces. The concept draws lessons from Ukraine and aims to reduce casualties in a potential conflict.
item.dc:creator: Defense News

item.title: 🛢️🇨🇳🇷🇺 China Turns to Russian Oil as Gulf Supply Drops Amid Hormuz Crisis
item.description: Chinese customs data shows Russian crude shipments to China rose 11.3% year-on-year in April as Gulf imports plunged during the Strait of Hormuz crisis. However, the discount on Russian oil has shrunk significantly due to sanctions waivers boosting global demand for Russian barrels.
item.dc:creator: SCMP

item.title: ⚠️🇮🇷 IRGC Warns War Will Spread Far Beyond Region If US-Israel Resume Attacks
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards warned that renewed US-Israeli attacks would trigger a conflict spreading "far beyond the region." The statement comes as Trump set a deadline of several days for a deal, threatening to resume strikes if no agreement is reached.
item.dc:creator: Daily Sabah

item.title: 🇹🇼🤖 Taiwan Unveils New Unmanned Ground Reconnaissance Vehicle
item.description: Taiwan's NCSIST revealed a new 4x4 unmanned electric reconnaissance vehicle with autonomous driving capabilities, armed with a 12.7mm remote weapon station. The platform is designed for stealth operations and can integrate with manned-unmanned teaming concepts.
item.dc:creator: Janes

item.title: 🇯🇵🛢️ Japan secures alternative oil supplies to replace Middle East crude for summer
item.description: Japanese oil refiners will be able to secure sufficient substitute crude and petroleum products to replace Middle East supplies for summer, as the Iran conflict disrupts traditional supply chains.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇧🇾 US asks Ukraine to ease Belarus potash restrictions amid food security concerns
item.description: The United States is urging Ukraine to relax restrictions on potash fertilizer imports from Belarus and press European allies to follow suit, Bloomberg News reported.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russian attacks kill two in Ukraine as Kyiv drones strike central Russia
item.description: Two people were killed and 19 injured in Russian attacks on Ukraine overnight, while Ukraine sent drones to strike industrial areas in central Russia including the Stavropol region.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President says China undermining peace, warns against annexation
item.description: President Lai Ching-te stated Taiwan would never accept annexation by China, saying the island's future cannot be decided by external forces. The comments drew an angry reaction from Beijing.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🛢️ Chinese supertankers exit Hormuz as Trump and Vance signal Iran deal progress
item.description: Two Chinese supertankers carrying 4 million barrels of crude exited the Strait of Hormuz after waiting two months, as US officials expressed optimism about negotiations with Tehran.
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: ⚔️ Russia displays nuclear warhead transfers in major military exercise
item.description: Russia released footage of troops delivering nuclear warheads to mobile Iskander-M launch systems and moving them undetected to launch sites as part of a major military exercise.
item.dc:creator: Reuters
